name: test_recording_flu_vaccination_e2e
description:
Test: End-to-end test for recording a flu vaccination for a child.
Steps:
1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch name.
2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
3. Agree to flu vaccination, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress,
   register child as attending.
5. Record flu vaccination for the child.
Verification:
- Final consent message is shown after online consent.
- Vaccination is recorded for the child in the session.
descriptionHtml:
Test: End-to-end test for recording a flu vaccination for a child.
Steps:

  1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch name.
  2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
  3. Agree to flu vaccination, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
  4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress,
    register child as attending.
  5. Record flu vaccination for the child.
    Verification:
  • Final consent message is shown after online consent.
  • Vaccination is recorded for the child in the session.
statusMessage:

Actual value: <element(s) not found>

statusTrace:
flu_consent_url = '/consents/2DWU8LtZhA/flu/start'
setup_session_for_flu = ['Fluenz123', 'Cell-basedTrivalentInfluenzaVaccineSeqirus123']
online_consent_page = <mavis.test.pages.online_consent.OnlineConsentPage object at 0x7f29ac6d6f90>
sessions_page = <mavis.test.pages.sessions.SessionsPage object at 0x7f29ac6d6a50>
children_page = <mavis.test.pages.children.ChildrenPage object at 0x7f29ac0c62c0>
programmes_page = <mavis.test.pages.programmes.ProgrammesPage object at 0x7f29ac6d70e0>
start_page = <mavis.test.pages.start.StartPage object at 0x7f29ac0c63f0>
schools = [School(name='Chalgrove Primary School', urn='101309', site=None), School(name='Teesville Academy', urn='146887', site=None)]
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Damien', last_name='HUNT', nhs_number='9229672963', address=('Studio 42Y', 'Sinclair crossi...s='vhughes@example.com'), Parent(full_name='Aimee Hill', relationship='Mum', email_address='cartersam@example.net')))]}
dashboard_page = <mavis.test.pages.dashboard.DashboardPage object at 0x7f29acd7b800>
log_in_page = <mavis.test.pages.log_in.LogInPage object at 0x7f29aeabd9f0>
nurse = User(username='samantha52@example.com', password='samantha52@example.com', role='nurse')
team = Team(name='Patterson Ltd est. 1713', workgroup='W650H', careplus_venue_code='W650H', email='georgiamurray@example.com', phone='(07700) 900 178')

    @issue("MAV-1831")
    def test_recording_flu_vaccination_e2e(
        flu_consent_url,
        setup_session_for_flu,
        online_consent_page,
        sessions_page,
        children_page,
        programmes_page,
        start_page,
        schools,
        children,
        dashboard_page,
        log_in_page,
        nurse,
        team,
    ):
        """
        Test: End-to-end test for recording a flu vaccination for a child.
        Steps:
        1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch name.
        2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
        3. Agree to flu vaccination, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
        4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress,
           register child as attending.
        5. Record flu vaccination for the child.
        Verification:
        - Final consent message is shown after online consent.
        - Vaccination is recorded for the child in the session.
        """
        child = children[Programme.FLU][0]
        schools = schools[Programme.FLU]
        fluenz_batch_name = setup_session_for_flu[0]
    
        online_consent_page.go_to_url(flu_consent_url)
        start_page.start()
    
        online_consent_page.fill_details(child, child.parents[0], schools)
        online_consent_page.agree_to_flu_vaccination(consent_option=ConsentOption.BOTH)
        online_consent_page.fill_address_details(*child.address)
        online_consent_page.answer_health_questions(
            online_consent_page.get_number_of_health_questions_for_flu(ConsentOption.BOTH),
            yes_to_health_questions=False,
        )
        online_consent_page.click_confirm()
        online_consent_page.check_final_consent_message(
            child,
            programmes=[Programme.FLU],
            yes_to_health_questions=False,
            consent_option=ConsentOption.BOTH,
        )
    
        log_in_page.navigate()
        log_in_page.log_in_and_choose_team_if_necessary(nurse, team)
        dashboard_page.click_sessions()
    
        sessions_page.click_session_for_programme_group(schools[0], Programme.FLU)
        sessions_page.click_set_session_in_progress_for_today()
        sessions_page.register_child_as_attending(str(child))
>       sessions_page.record_vaccination_for_child(
            VaccinationRecord(child, Programme.FLU, fluenz_batch_name, ConsentOption.BOTH)
        )
